patches_added.name: Custom font
patches_added.description: Adds an option to replace Reddit Sans / Roboto with a custom TTF or OTF font file at runtime.

patches_added.name: Force system font
patches_added.description: Adds an option that renders Reddit with the device system font instead of Reddit Sans / Roboto.

patches_modified.name: Skip ads
patches_modified.description: Suppresses all ad delivery systems in Tubi Android TV.

patches_added.name: Google Maps for ReVanced GmsCore
patches_added.description: Routes supported Google Maps builds through ReVanced GmsCore using the patched Maps package and known Google Maps certificate spoof metadata.

patches_removed.name: Google Maps MicroG
patches_removed.description: Routes supported Google Maps builds through ReVanced GmsCore using the patched Maps package and known Google Maps certificate spoof metadata.

patches_modified.name: Login Fix
patches_modified.description: Bypasses verification bans by spoofing signatures, installers, and faking GMS checks. REQUIRED: You must manually install microG-RE for Play Integrity to pass.
